description:
Advances: mutagen.json_schema, mutagen.cli

Deliverable:
- `lib/mutagen_ex/json_reporter.ex` (module `MutagenEx.JsonReporter`).
  Owns both success and abort JSON variants per
  [mutagen.decision.json_reporter_owns_error](.spec/decisions/json_reporter_owns_error.md).
  Exposes `emit_report/1` and `emit_error/2` returning `{iodata, exit_code}`.
  No `IO.puts` / `System.halt` / `File.write!` calls inside.
- `lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex` orchestration: state machine that dispatches
  through the private collaborator table set up in S1. Drives the pipeline
  CLI → ScopeResolver → TestSelector → AstCache → CoverageRunner →
  MutationEnumerator → Baseline → MutationRunner → JsonReporter → I/O.
- Stable v1 JSON schema covering all top-level fields per
  [mutagen.json_schema](.spec/specs/json_schema.spec.md) r1-r8.
- Golden fixtures at `test/mutagen_ex/golden/`:
  `baseline_red.json`, `coverage_partial_mutation_perfect.json`,
  `coverage_full_mutation_partial.json`, `error_unresolvable_scope.json`,
  `mutation_with_skipped.json`, `partial_report_cover_failure.json`.
- Test files: `test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_test.exs`,
  `test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_golden_test.exs`. State-machine error-path
  tests inject fake collaborators via the private dispatch table to cover
  all six error-exit paths.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: `mix test test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_test.exs`,
  `mix test test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_golden_test.exs`.
- Covers spec-verification stubs `mutagen.json_schema.v1`-`.v4`,
  `mutagen.cli.v2` (exit codes).
- Behaviors to demonstrate: scenarios `mutagen.json_schema.s1` through `s6`,
  scenarios `mutagen.cli.s6` and `s7`.

Out of Scope (files):
- `lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner.ex` (S5)
- `lib/mutagen_ex/coverage_runner.ex` (S5)
- `test/fixtures/lane_project/**` (S7)
- `lib/mutagen_ex/mutators/**` (S4a)

Allowed touches (this stage may modify):
- `lib/mutagen_ex/json_reporter.ex`
- `lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex` (orchestration body; skeleton already exists
  from S1)
- `test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_test.exs`
- `test/mutagen_ex/json_reporter_golden_test.exs`
- `test/mutagen_ex/golden/*.json`
- `@moduledoc` skeleton on `Mix.Tasks.Mutagen` (full doc content lands in
  S8)

Out of Scope (intent):
- Do not write a separate `ErrorReporter`. Both JSON variants live in one
  module per [mutagen.decision.json_reporter_owns_error](.spec/decisions/json_reporter_owns_error.md).
- Do not include any I/O inside the reporter. The Mix task body does
  `IO.puts` / `File.write!` based on `Config.json_path`.
- Do not support `--no-json` here. It exits with `:flag_not_supported_in_v1`
  per [mutagen.decision.no_pretty_output_v1](.spec/decisions/no_pretty_output_v1.md).

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly with `--warnings-as-errors`
- [ ] All golden fixtures match byte-for-byte
- [ ] State-machine error-path tests cover all 6 exits
- [ ] Spec verification passes (`mutagen.json_schema.v1`-`.v4`, `mutagen.cli.v2`)
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket
title: S6: JSON reporter + Mix task wiring
